items.project_definition: A validation rule preventing the removal of a learning offering if linked student registrations exist, triggering a 409 status code.
The browser-level security mechanism governing cross-origin resource sharing for the provided API endpoints.
The one-way mathematical transformation applied to user passwords during the registration process to ensure secure storage.
A compact, URL-safe means of representing claims to be transferred between two parties, passed via the Bearer scheme in the Authorization header.
